# freeswitch_user (Resource)

A FreeSWITCH SIP user / extension.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "freeswitch_user" "u2001" {
  domain = freeswitch_domain.main.name
  number = "2001"

  params = {
    password    = var.user_password
    vm-password = "2001"
  }

  variables = {
    effective_caller_id_name   = "User 2001"
    effective_caller_id_number = "2001"
    user_context               = "company"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String)
- `number` (String)

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `params` (Map of String, Sensitive) User params (e.g. password, vm-password). Sensitive.
- `variables` (Map of String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `updated_at` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# freeswitch_user is imported by "domain/number".
terraform import freeswitch_user.u2001 192.168.48.143/2001
```
